name: zimage_fonts_load_from_path
description: zImage::FontsLoadFromPath reports failure and returns -1 when the font ZRD cannot be loaded.
known_limits: Reviewed VC byte comparison from python tools/recoil_vc6_verify.py zimage_init_helpers failed under VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4: 193 unmasked mismatches, 76 relocation-masked bytes, BN size 324, VC object size 288, 6 trailing VC NOPs trimmed; see build/vc6-verify/zimage_init_helpers/verify/46efe0_byte_triage.txt.
Current self-contained functional coverage exercises the missing-ZRD failure path; full success-path coverage remains desirable before a binary-safe zImage class/source-cluster pass.
